message:
✨ Add persistent shopping cart sidebar to tank wizard (#20)

Adds a two-column layout with a sticky cart sidebar that shows selected
equipment, fish from the calculator, subtotal, savings, recommendations
for uncompleted steps, and step-specific automation guides. Mobile gets
a sticky bottom bar that opens a Sheet with the same content. Fish
selections now carry through from the tank calculator via URL params.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -410,7 +410,11 @@ export function TankCalculator() {
